summary: Iteration 78 - Purchase Voucher Form Redesign + PDF/Excel Exports with Ledger Balance - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All 12 feature tests verified via Playwright.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (console warning only, no functional impact)

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test voucher (TEST_Iteration78_Balance) during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Purchase Voucher form redesigned to match Sale Voucher - Table component for items, stock dropdown with quantities. PDF/Excel exports include ledger-based Paid and Balance columns from cashbook. Stock overview cards show OUT OF STOCK/LOW STOCK labels.

details: First row has Invoice No, Date, Party Name, RST No fields
Layout matches Sale Voucher form
data-testid selectors: pv-invoice, pv-date, pv-party, pv-rst
Items section uses Table component (not simple inputs)
Columns: Name of Item (Select), Stock, Quantity, Rate, Amount
Add Item button (data-testid=pv-add-item) adds new rows
Amount auto-calculates from Quantity × Rate
Dropdown shows stock items with quantities (e.g., 'Paddy (461.96 Q)')
11 options including standard items and custom option
'+ Other / Custom Item' option at bottom in amber color
Stock column shows available quantity for selected stock item
Shows '461.96 Q' when Paddy selected
Shows 'New' for custom items
GST section in bordered box
GST Type selector (No GST, CGST+SGST, IGST)
CGST/SGST/IGST percentage inputs when applicable
Grand Total displayed prominently in emerald color
Cash (Truck ko) and Diesel (Pump se) inputs
Advance Paid (Party ko diya) input with blue border
Balance (Party ko dena baki) auto-calculates: Grand Total - Advance
Test: Paddy 10Q × Rs.2500 = Rs.25,000 total
Advance: Rs.10,000
Balance: Rs.15,000 (correctly calculated as 25,000 - 10,000)
Balance shown in red when > 0, emerald when 0
Cards show all stock items with available quantities
OUT OF STOCK label (red) for items with 0 stock: Rice (Raw), Bran, Broken, FRK
LOW STOCK label (amber) for items with stock <= 10: Kanki (6Q), Husk (5Q)
Banner visible when items have stock <= 10
Shows: 'Low Stock Alert: Rice (Raw) (0Q), Bran (0Q), Broken (0Q), Kanki (6Q), Husk (5Q), FRK (0Q) - Re-order karein!'
Returns valid PDF (verified magic bytes %PDF-)
Includes ledger-based 'Ledger Paid' and 'Balance' columns
Optimized for A4 landscape with smaller fonts/margins
Returns valid Excel file (ZIP/XLSX format)
UI button (data-testid=pv-export-excel) visible and accessible
Returns valid PDF with ledger-based balance column
Includes 'Paid' column from Cash Book payments

test_classes: TestPDFExports (4 tests) - PDF export verification for Sale and Purchase books
TestStockItemsForPurchaseVoucher (2 tests) - Stock items endpoint with quantities

frontend_test_summary.form_layout_first_row: PASSED - Invoice No, Date, Party, RST
frontend_test_summary.items_table_component: PASSED - Name of Item, Stock, Quantity, Rate, Amount columns
frontend_test_summary.item_select_dropdown: PASSED - 11 options including stock items with quantities
frontend_test_summary.custom_item_option: PASSED - '+ Other / Custom Item' in amber
frontend_test_summary.gst_section: PASSED - Bordered box with GST type selector
frontend_test_summary.payment_section: PASSED - Grand Total, Cash, Diesel, Advance, Balance
frontend_test_summary.pdf_excel_buttons: PASSED - Both buttons visible and accessible
